Alko Oy Keskusvarasto.reason: Major distributor with 168-day overdue invoice #4460 (€18.5K); needs strict terms reset post-recovery.

Kesko Oyj Päivittäistavarakauppa.reason: Large retail chain; invoice #5750 (€3.3K) now 11 days overdue despite size—enforce net-30.

My Dear Beer B.V..reason: International distributor; 57-day overdue on #5151 (€9.6K)—likely export DSO creep, cap at 35.

Wittich Weine und Biere AG.reason: German distributor; 4 days overdue on #5999 (€3.2K)—export baseline, enforce strictly.

OlutSatama (Ideaosuuskunta Aito).reason: Domestic account; 284 days overdue on #3837 (€5.9K)—chronic non-payer, move to COD or suspend.

alerts.message: Escalate invoice #4460 (€18,484, 167 days overdue since 2025-10-30) to legal/debt collection immediately. This is 22% of total overdue AR and from Finland's largest distributor—payment suspension justified.
Invoke payment plan or suspend shipments on invoice #3837 (€5,882, 284 days overdue since 2025-07-05). This account is non-viable; do not ship further until arrangement signed.
Pursue recovery on invoice #14 (€4,540, 579 days overdue since 2024-08-14). Likely write-off candidate; contact customer today for 10-day cure notice or formal debt recovery.
Invoice #5151 (€9,558) is 57 days overdue as of 2026-04-14. Contact customer with 7-day payment ultimatum; withhold next shipment pending resolution. Monitor DSO creep on exports.

€82.2K overdue AR (65 invoices, 40.7% of total AR) threatens fixed €62.8K/month burn (payroll + debt service). Weekly cash burn = ~€14.6K; overdue backlog = 5.6 weeks of runway. Prioritize collection calls on top 5 overdue accounts today.
Invoice #5750 (€3,296) due 2026-04-03 is now 11 days overdue. Send payment reminder today; large account but enforce terms to prevent DSO creep.
Open POs (€79.996K) and 30-day sales (€39.958K) suggest €50–70K inbound inventory costs over next 4 weeks. Coordinate with AR collections: delayed payments will compress cash on 62% YoY growth.

insights.weekly_cash_risk: Overdue AR of €82.2K against fixed monthly burn of €62.8K creates 5.6-week cash runway if collections stall; Alko (€18.5K) and OlutSatama (€5.9K) recovery critical this week.
insights.top_action: Call Alko Oy Keskusvarasto today (invoice #4460, €18.5K, 167 days overdue) with 5-day payment or legal notice; simultaneously issue COD/suspend terms for OlutSatama and initiate formal debt recovery on Wet Goods PTE LTD.
pattern_insights: Five invoices (€42.1K, 51% of overdue) are >40 days past due and from major distribution accounts (Alko, OlutSatama, My Dear Beer, Wet Goods); suggests pricing/credit policy was historically lax for volume—tighten DSO floors on all distributors to 30–35 days.

Own channels (Espoo Shop, Online, Bars) represent €39.9K recent sales but are not in overdue list—validate that internal cross-company invoicing is excluded from AR aging and prioritize protecting these 3–5 day payers in collection priority.
insights.wc_note: €132.7K open AR (66% of budgeted monthly revenue) plus €82.2K overdue create structural working capital strain that will worsen with 62% growth unless DSO hardens to 35–40 days maximum; August peak (€282K) revenue arriving 6–8 weeks late means June–July cash trough will be acute—front-load Q2 collections now.
